description: Maps industry verticals and sub-types to applicable compliance frameworks. Use this file to filter all_controls.json for a specific product profile.

usage.step_2: Collect framework_ids from: base_requirements + vertical.frameworks + sub_type.frameworks
usage.step_3: Filter all_controls.json where control.framework_id is in your collected set
usage.step_4: Sort by applicability priority: mandatory > conditional > recommended
usage.mapping_key: framework_id values exactly match keys in all_controls.json and per-framework files in dataset/controls/

base_requirements.description: These frameworks apply to EVERY Indian digital product regardless of vertical

frameworks.reason: Applies to all Digital Data Fiduciaries processing personal data of Indian residents
Operational rules under DPDP Act — consent, breach notification, DPIA requirements
Base cybercrime and electronic records law for all Indian digital businesses
Sensitive personal data rules apply to any body corporate handling SPDI
6-hour cyber incident reporting obligation applies to all Indian companies
Applies to all companies incorporated in India — governance, accounts, directors
Applies to any entity with employees — wages, safety, social security, industrial relations
Information security baseline — recommended for all digital products handling user data

cross_border_requirements.description: Additional frameworks triggered by geographic user base

frameworks.reason: Mandatory for any product processing personal data of EU/EEA residents

payment_card_requirement.description: Triggered by handling card payment data, independent of vertical

frameworks.reason: Required for all entities storing, processing, or transmitting cardholder data

fintech.label: Financial Technology
fintech.description: Apps and platforms operating in financial services — payments, lending, banking, investments, insurance

mandatory.reason: KYC/Customer Due Diligence mandatory for all RBI-regulated and financial entities
Anti-Money Laundering obligations apply to all financial businesses
RBI cybersecurity baseline for all regulated financial entities

conditional.reason: Applies when an RBI-regulated entity outsources IT/technology functions

recommended.reason: ISO 27001 certification is expected by enterprise banking clients and auditors

payment_gateway.label: Payment Gateway / Payment Aggregator
payment_gateway.description: Platforms that process, route, or aggregate online/offline payments

mandatory.reason: Mandatory for all entities in the card data environment
KYC for merchant onboarding and transaction monitoring
AML transaction monitoring and STR reporting

lending.label: Digital Lending / NBFC / Loan Platform
lending.description: Apps offering personal loans, BNPL, business loans, or credit lines

mandatory.reason: Directly governs digital lending platforms and Lending Service Providers
KYC/CDD mandatory for borrower onboarding
AML obligations for loan disbursals and repayments

conditional.reason: Required if repayments processed via card

neobank.label: Neobank / Digital Bank
neobank.description: Digital-first banking products, savings accounts, current accounts via partnership with scheduled banks

mandatory.reason: Full KYC mandatory for account opening
Cybersecurity framework for banking platforms
AML transaction monitoring for banking operations
Card issuance and processing compliance

conditional.reason: Applies when core banking or IT services are outsourced

wealthtech.label: Wealthtech / Investment Platform
wealthtech.description: Mutual fund platforms, stock brokers, robo-advisors, algo trading apps

mandatory.reason: Cybersecurity framework mandatory for all SEBI-registered intermediaries
AML/CFT obligations for all SEBI-registered market participants
KYC for investor onboarding in regulated investment products
AML reporting for securities transactions

conditional.reason: Mandatory if platform provides personalized investment advice
Mandatory for platforms offering algorithmic or API-based trading

account_aggregator.label: Account Aggregator / Financial Data Platform
account_aggregator.description: Platforms operating as AA, FIP, or FIU in the RBI Account Aggregator ecosystem

mandatory.reason: Core regulatory framework for AA/FIP/FIU entities
KYC for customer consent and identity verification
Cybersecurity obligations for RBI-regulated AA entities

recommended.reason: Strong signal of trust for financial data intermediaries

crypto_web3.label: Crypto / Web3 / Virtual Digital Assets
crypto_web3.description: Crypto exchanges, VDA service providers, NFT platforms, DeFi apps

mandatory.reason: VDA service providers are now reporting entities under PMLA
KYC requirements for VDA user onboarding

conditional.reason: Required if platform accepts card purchases

recommended.reason: Security certification expected by institutional clients

insurtech.label: Insurance Technology
insurtech.description: Digital insurance products, distribution platforms, and insurance intermediaries

mandatory.reason: Cybersecurity baseline mandatory for all IRDAI-regulated insurers
AML/CFT obligations for insurance entities
AML obligations extend to insurance intermediaries
KYC for policyholder onboarding

conditional.reason: Mandatory for insurance comparison / web aggregator platforms

mandatory.reason: Direct compliance obligation for licensed insurers
AML program mandatory for insurers

insurance_aggregator.label: Insurance Web Aggregator / Comparison Platform
insurance_aggregator.description: Platforms that compare and sell policies from multiple insurers

mandatory.reason: Core regulation for web aggregator license and operations

healthtech.label: Health Technology
healthtech.description: Digital health platforms, telemedicine, medical records, wellness, diagnostics, medtech devices

mandatory.reason: Health data is Sensitive Personal Data — highest protection tier under DPDP
Health records are SPDI requiring explicit consent and security

conditional.reason: Mandatory for any telemedicine / remote doctor consultation platform

recommended.reason: Security certification for health data custodians — expected by hospitals and enterprise clients

telemedicine.label: Telemedicine / Online Doctor Consultation
telemedicine.description: Platforms connecting patients with doctors via video, chat, or audio

mandatory.reason: Primary regulation governing telemedicine practice in India

health_records.label: Electronic Health Records / PHR Platform
health_records.description: Platforms storing, managing, or sharing patient health records

mandatory.reason: Health records classified as SPDI requiring strict security and consent
Health data requires Significant Data Fiduciary treatment

conditional.reason: Health data is special category data under GDPR — highest protection tier

wellness_fitness.label: Wellness / Fitness / Mental Health App
wellness_fitness.description: Apps tracking fitness, nutrition, sleep, mental health

conditional.reason: Biometric and health data classified as SPDI

recommended.reason: Security baseline for sensitive health data

edtech.label: Education Technology
edtech.description: Online learning platforms, test-prep, upskilling, school management software

conditional.reason: Processing data of children requires verifiable parental consent under DPDP — significant compliance burden
GDPR Article 8 applies strict age-verification for processing children's data
Required for course fee payment processing

recommended.reason: Required for B2B institutional contracts with schools and universities

mandatory.reason: Children's data classification under DPDP requires explicit parental consent mechanisms

upskilling_platform.label: Upskilling / Professional Learning Platform
upskilling_platform.description: Platforms serving adult learners for professional development

conditional.reason: GDPR for learner data if serving EU users

ecommerce.label: E-Commerce / Online Retail
ecommerce.description: Online marketplaces, D2C brands, social commerce, and retail platforms

mandatory.reason: Mandatory for all e-commerce entities selling to Indian consumers — listing, returns, grievances

conditional.reason: Required if platform handles card data directly (not via a PG)
High-value marketplace transactions may trigger PMLA reporting

marketplace.label: Online Marketplace
marketplace.description: Platform listing multiple sellers — inventory not owned by platform

mandatory.reason: Marketplace-specific obligations: seller listing, grievance officer, returns

d2c_brand.label: Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) Brand
d2c_brand.description: Brand selling own products directly via website or app

mandatory.reason: D2C brands are e-commerce entities under the rules
Delivery SLA, return, and grievance obligations apply
Gig worker and delivery partner employment classification obligations

saas.label: Software as a Service (SaaS)
saas.description: B2B and B2C cloud software products — productivity, CRM, ERP, developer tools, analytics

conditional.reason: SaaS processing EU customer or end-user data must comply with GDPR as a data processor
SaaS vendors contracted by banks/NBFCs must comply with RBI outsourcing directions

recommended.reason: ISO 27001 is the primary trust signal for enterprise B2B sales — required in most enterprise procurement

fintech_saas.label: SaaS for Financial Services
fintech_saas.description: Software sold to banks, NBFCs, insurance companies

mandatory.reason: Mandatory for IT service providers to RBI-regulated entities
Security requirements flow down to critical IT vendors

recommended.reason: Certification expected in all bank vendor RFPs

healthtech_saas.label: SaaS for Healthcare
healthtech_saas.description: Software sold to hospitals, clinics, pharma companies

mandatory.reason: Health records processed on behalf of hospitals = SPDI obligations
Payroll and HR platforms must embed labour code compliance for clients

conditional.reason: API platforms acting as data processors under GDPR must sign DPAs

recommended.reason: Required for enterprise API integrations and SOC 2 readiness

hrtech.label: HR Technology
hrtech.description: Recruitment platforms, workforce management, payroll, employee benefits, gig economy

mandatory.reason: Core labour law compliance — wages, safety, social security, industrial relations

conditional.reason: Employee and candidate data is personal data under DPDP
Required for salary card or expense card programs

recruitment_platform.label: Recruitment / Job Portal
recruitment_platform.description: Job boards, recruitment automation, ATS platforms

conditional.reason: Candidate resumes and profiles are personal data requiring consent

gig_platform.label: Gig / Freelance Marketplace
gig_platform.description: Platforms connecting businesses with gig workers or freelancers

mandatory.reason: Gig worker classification, platform aggregator obligations under Code on Social Security

payroll_platform.label: Payroll / Compensation Platform
payroll_platform.description: Payroll processing, TDS compliance, PF/ESI management

mandatory.reason: Wage Code compliance for payroll calculations, deductions, and timelines

logistics.label: Logistics & Supply Chain
logistics.description: Last-mile delivery, fleet management, freight, warehousing, supply chain software

mandatory.reason: Delivery workers and drivers classified as gig workers under Code on Social Security

conditional.reason: Location tracking of delivery partners and customers = personal data processing

recommended.reason: Required for B2B enterprise logistics contracts

mandatory.reason: Rider classification and social security contributions

freight_platform.label: Freight / B2B Logistics Platform
freight_platform.description: Truck booking, cargo management, freight brokerage

conditional.reason: Driver employment and safety obligations

media_entertainment.label: Media & Entertainment
media_entertainment.description: OTT streaming, gaming, news, podcasts, social media, creator economy

mandatory.reason: Intermediary liability, content takedown, and grievance rules apply to all online platforms

conditional.reason: Significant Data Fiduciary classification likely — parental consent for children
Cookie consent, data subject rights, DPO appointment may be required

ott_platform.label: OTT / Video Streaming Platform
ott_platform.description: Video streaming services with subscription or ad-supported models

mandatory.reason: OTT platforms are significant social media intermediaries under IT Rules 2021

gaming.label: Gaming / Real-Money Gaming
gaming.description: Mobile games, casual games, fantasy sports, real-money skill games

conditional.reason: Real-money gaming platforms may be covered under PMLA reporting requirements
Card payment processing for in-game purchases

social_media.label: Social Media / Creator Platform
social_media.description: Social networks, creator monetization, community platforms

mandatory.reason: Significant Social Media Intermediary rules — grievance officer, content moderation, traceability

govtech.label: Government Technology / Civic Tech
govtech.description: Platforms built for government clients, public sector, civic services

mandatory.reason: Critical information infrastructure — enhanced reporting obligations
Government data fiduciaries have specific obligations under DPDP
ISO 27001 certification mandatory in most government IT procurement

agritech.label: Agricultural Technology
agritech.description: Farmer-facing apps, agri-marketplace, precision farming, supply chain for agriculture

conditional.reason: Farmer data (land records, income, identity) is personal data under DPDP
Agri-credit and insurance products require KYC compliance
Rural cash transaction reporting obligations

proptech.label: Property Technology
proptech.description: Real estate platforms, co-living, fractional ownership, property management

mandatory.reason: Real estate companies governed by Companies Act — additional RERA obligations outside this dataset

conditional.reason: Real estate agents and property transaction platforms are reporting entities under PMLA
Card payment processing for rent or property deposits

legaltech.label: Legal Technology
legaltech.description: Legal research, contract management, document automation, dispute resolution platforms

conditional.reason: Legal documents contain highly sensitive personal data requiring enhanced protection
Legal tech processing EU client data must comply with GDPR as a data processor

recommended.reason: Security certification expected by law firm and enterprise legal clients

deep_tech.label: Deep Tech / AI / IoT
deep_tech.description: AI/ML platforms, IoT products, robotics, data analytics, computer vision, NLP

conditional.reason: AI training on personal data requires consent, purpose limitation, and data minimization
Facial recognition, fingerprints, voice prints = SPDI under IT Rules
IoT in critical sectors (power, water, transport) triggers CERT-In obligations
GDPR Article 22 — automated decision-making and profiling restrictions

recommended.reason: Required for enterprise AI product deals and government AI deployments

framework_registry.description: Quick reference: all 25 framework IDs in this dataset with their domain and regulator
